task_completion.description: Verify that the existing implant at site #36 is selected in the Blue Sky Plan interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the implant to be highlighted in the 2D/3D views or selected in the implant list/object browser. The implant properties panel should be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the implant has been tilted approximately 10 degrees lingually.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an angulation value of ~10° (acceptable range 5°-15°) in the implant properties panel, or visually confirm in the cross-sectional view that the implant axis is tilted towards the lingual side compared to a vertical orientation.

task_completion.description: Verify that the implant has been moved approximately 2mm deeper (apically) into the bone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a depth change indication in the properties panel, or visually confirm in the cross-sectional view that the top of the implant (platform) is now submerged below the bone crest by approximately 2mm.

task_completion.description: Verify that no new implants were created during the modification process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the implant list or object browser; there should only be exactly one implant listed in the project.

task_completion.description: Verify that the modified project has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save Project' dialog box being confirmed, a save progress bar, or the main window title bar showing the updated project name (e.g., Case_36_Revision.bsp) without an unsaved indicator.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Blue Sky Plan GUI to modify the implant.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Blue Sky Plan 5 software interface (implant panels, 3D views, or dialogs), not a text editor modifying the .bsp file directly.

integrity.description: Verify the 2D/3D views actually reflect the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The cross-sectional or 3D views should visually update to show the tilted and deeper implant, proving the software actually processed the parameter changes.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just print a fake success message.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be typing 'Implant tilted 10 degrees and moved 2mm' into a terminal or notepad to simulate completion.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying an existing implant in Blue Sky Plan 5 at site #36. The target angulation is 10 degrees lingually (acceptable tolerance: 5 to 15 degrees). The target depth change is 2.0mm deeper/apically into the bone (acceptable tolerance: 1.0 to 3.0mm). The project should be saved, typically to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Case_36_Revision.bsp'. Ensure only one implant exists in the project (no new implants created).
